name: Design System Editorial (Source/Outfit/Gold)
description: High-fidelity editorial design system focusing on typography, whitespace, and premium color palettes.
components: PremiumHeader: Sticky with blur, gold accent border
EditorialCard: Subtle shadow, Source Serif headings, high-contrast text
GoldButton: Outfit typography, subtle gold gradient, smooth hover
SidebarNav: Dark #1B1B2F theme with Outfit labels and Source Serif active state
acceptance_criteria: AC-ED-01: Typography scale is perfectly legible and follows editorial standards
AC-ED-02: Color palette uses #F7F5F0 as base with #D4A853 as high-impact accent
AC-ED-03: Responsive behavior maintains white-space and luxury feel at all breakpoints
